balanced.zh_desc: 兼顾一级参与、基石安全和上市后二级交易确认。
balanced.en_desc: Balances primary participation, cornerstone safety and post-listing confirmation.

primary_ipo.zh_desc: 更重视认购热度、中签效率、孖展和首日表现。
primary_ipo.en_desc: Emphasizes demand heat, allocation efficiency, margin demand and first-day performance.

cornerstone.zh_desc: 更重视估值安全、基石质量、投行质量和解禁压力。
cornerstone.en_desc: Emphasizes valuation safety, cornerstone quality, syndicate quality and lock-up risk.

secondary_trade.zh_desc: 更重视暗盘、首日确认、上市后路径和深V/趋势信号。
secondary_trade.en_desc: Emphasizes gray market, first-day confirmation, post-listing path and deep-V/trend signals.

risk_control.zh_desc: 更重视破发、解禁、回撤、流动性和估值安全边际。
risk_control.en_desc: Emphasizes break issue price risk, lock-up pressure, drawdown, liquidity and valuation margin of safety.

_a1_default_weights.en_name: A1 Default Early IPO Participation Bias
_a1_default_weights.zh_desc: A1阶段不使用发行价/认购/行情等未来数据；用于提前建档、研究和额度准备。
_a1_default_weights.en_desc: A1 excludes future deal/quote data; used for early research and quota preparation.
